sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Analyze current board state
print("Level:", current_frame.level)
print("Step:", current_frame.step)
print("Valid actions:", valid_actions)
# Get object positions and sizes
objects = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for obj in objects:
    print(f"Object {obj['id']}: color={obj['color']}, size={obj['pixels']} pixels")
# Plan: Continue exploring by moving right
action_to_take = ['RIGHT']
print("Action plan:", action_to_take)
action(action_to_take)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
